axes.biological_scope: Tissue-level cartilage identity: 弹性软骨/耳软骨

literature_support: Recent literature max count: 227

axes.interpretation: EC markers support an elastic-cartilage-like state; ELN/FBLN5/LOXL1 give direct matrix evidence, while several top genes are metabolic/translation genes and should be reviewed before becoming core markers.
limitations: Tissue-level only; does not capture cell-state heterogeneity within tissue

axes.biological_scope: Tissue-level cartilage identity: 透明/关节软骨

literature_support: Recent literature max count: 94

axes.interpretation: HC markers strongly support a hyaline cartilage matrix programme with ACAN, COL2A1, COL9A3, CLEC3A, FRZB, CNMD and MGP.
limitations: Tissue-level only; does not capture cell-state heterogeneity within tissue

axes.name_cn: 纤维软骨/半月板样软骨
axes.biological_scope: Tissue-level cartilage identity: 纤维软骨/半月板样软骨

literature_support: Recent literature max count: 62

axes.interpretation: FC markers support a fibrocartilage/fibromatrix-like state with FBLN1, VCAN, COL1A1/COL1A2, S100A4 and stress/remodelling genes.
limitations: Tissue-level only; does not capture cell-state heterogeneity within tissue

axes.biological_scope: Functional gene module: 软骨发育

literature_support: Matching terms: cartilage development (GO:0051216), regulation of cartilage development (GO:0061035), negative regulation of cartilage development (GO:0061037)

limitations: Consensus-only; atlas-specific weighting limited to AvAm axis

axes.biological_scope: Functional gene module: 抗血管化抗钙化

literature_support: Matching terms: anti-angiogenesis / avascular cartilage, anti-calcification / anti-mineralization

axes.interpretation: 软骨低血管化与抗钙化功能基因集。代表基因包括抗钙化 MGP 与低血管化/抗血管 CNMD (chondromodulin-1)。该词条由 PMID 文献先验与 cgrm v0.3.1 atlas 支持共同构建。
limitations: Consensus-only; atlas-specific weighting limited to AvAm axis

notes: Candidate axes are under development and not validated for production use

evidence_policy.atlas_derived_note: All atlas-derived evidence is classified as derivation or internal_support, NOT independent validation.
independent_validation_requirements: Independent GEO/scRNA not used in modeling
Self-generated ear/nose/rib cartilage data not used in atlas construction
